title: E-Commerce Platform — Full Project Proposal
overview: IzaXotic proposes to design and develop a high-performance, scalable e-commerce platform tailored for TechVentures Pvt Ltd, leveraging modern web technologies for an exceptional user experience.
scope: The project includes frontend development, backend API, database design, admin dashboard, payment gateway integration, SEO optimization, and 3 months of post-launch support.

phases.name: Frontend Development
phases.deliverables: Responsive Next.js storefront, product pages, cart

phases.name: Backend & API
phases.deliverables: REST APIs, database, auth, Razorpay integration

phases.name: Testing & Launch
phases.deliverables: QA, performance audit, deployment, DNS setup

paymentSchedule: 40% on kickoff (₹68,440) · 30% at mid-point (₹51,330) · 30% on delivery (₹51,330)
deliverables: Fully functional e-commerce site, admin panel, source code, deployment, 3-month support
terms: This proposal is valid for 30 days. All work remains property of the client upon full payment. IzaXotic retains the right to showcase the project in portfolio.
notes: Client verbally confirmed acceptance on 20 Apr 2026.
